introduction: SYNOPSISLiving an idle life, gangster Yo-sub is drawn to Mi-hi at a swimming pool, who is the second wife of elderly businessman Kyung-hwan. Yo-sub sneaks into Kyung-hwan's house and takes Mi-hi by force. He gets himself hired as the gardener and soon his true character begins to show. Finally, Yo-sub kills Kyung-hwan and makes it look like a car accident. He takes Mi-hi, now an heiress with a substantial fortune, and goes on a honeymoon with her. However, while resting in the hot springs, Yo-sub receives a surprise attack from a robber. He is stabbed and subsequently dies. Returning alone, Mi-hi goes back home with the supposed 'robber' with a smile of satisfaction. When she arrives at the house, Kyung-hwan, who was thought dead, holds a rifle at her and the man. He pulls the trigger.故事Yoseop饥饿的流浪者，谁被吸引到第二任妻子美树在泳池老gyeonghwan企业家流氓。一个yoseop迫使别墅三木工作，当花匠后潜入豪宅拥有gyeonghwan，缓缓抬起magak。最后，yoseop最gyeonghwan由车祸中丧生，留下了巨大遗产的蜜月之旅和三木的女继承人。但是yoseop是sumjinda打突然袭击，而不在温泉强度一把刀。三木独自东京谁需要用我们的实力回来了别墅的工作最满意的。该别墅已gyeonghwan含枪发现死线和扣动扳机和向三木工作。
